description_long: This object is a whimsical, plush representation of a corded phone, designed with a soft, fabric exterior and a playful, animal-like appearance. The main body is dark brown with lighter polka dots, and it features two button eyes and a bright red nose, giving it a characterful face. A cream-colored ribbon is tied around its midsection, fastened with a small button, adding to its decorative charm. The top of the object has two ear-like protrusions, while the back and sides are rounded and smooth, with a white patch on the rear. The base is flat and appears to be made of fabric, with a tag visible on one side. There are no visible electronic or mechanical components, and the object lacks a traditional handset, keypad, or rotary dial.
description: A plush, animal-themed corded phone with button eyes, a red nose, and a ribbon, made from soft fabric and featuring a whimsical design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face with button eyes, red nose, and ribbon tied around the body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rounded shape, white patch on the back, and the tag protruding from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the two ear-like protrusions and the smooth, polka-dotted back.
description_view_3: Angled view displays the side of the face, the white patch, and the ribbon detail.
